subcodes.first_line: O ye who are near unto the Threshold of Grandeur! Ibn-i-Abhar expresseth his utmost gratitude for your solicitude and love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقربان درگاه کبریاء جناب ابن ابهر نهایت ممنونیت را از رعایت و محبت شما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
